decisionRationale: All 15 hard gates PASS. Production DB safety confirmed. Risk register complete. Ready to request CTO/CEO approval token.

requiredActionsBeforeTokenUse.description: Define and test production rollback runbook on staging (RISK-08)
Run migration on staging environment before production (RISK-01)
CTO/CEO review this P21 report and explicitly provide approval token

productionSafetyStatement: Production DB has NOT been written at any phase (P17-P21)

noProductionWriteStatement: This script and all P21 artifacts do NOT write to, modify, or apply any changes to the production database. Production migration is deferred to P22 pending CTO/CEO approval token.
